event: presented with necrotizing fasciitis of left thigh and groin
alcohol use 1-2 bottles of beer two to three times per year
hypotensive with blood pressure 87/63 mm Hg
severe tenderness to entire left thigh
CT scan air in posterior thigh muscles
aggressive fluid resuscitation for septic shock
taken to operating room for fasciotomy and debridement
intraoperative wound culture grew C. septicum
postoperative management in intensive care unit
antibiotic regimen changed to clindamycin and piperacillin/tazobactam
frank blood in fecal management tube on postoperative day 12
CT imaging negative for metastatic spread
followed up outpatient without recurrence of colon cancer
no signs or symptoms of recurrence
